name: Codex Example Runtime Profile
used_for: AI judgement input, not fixed routing
can_read_files: depends on workspace and runtime permissions
can_write_files: depends on workspace and runtime permissions
external_dir_config: project binding may point to AgentPal workspace as a Pal source
external directory access needs current runtime evidence
known_strengths: can work well with Markdown and JSON workspaces when files are available
can produce file diffs and command evidence when the runtime exposes tools
can follow thin AgentPal binding instructions through AGENTS.md
known_limits: workspace and filesystem access are permission-dependent
this profile is not a live scan of the user's Codex environment
risk_notes: file writes and commands need evidence from the current execution layer
do not infer external project access without current binding evidence
recommended_use_as_candidate: Runtime Task Package execution when current permissions allow
refresh_policy: manual review when Codex project binding or runtime permissions change
